Title: Microbial Melatonin Production Improves Plant Metabolic Function in Short‐Term Climate‐Induced Stresses

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: maintains ionic homeostasis under salinity and heat stress
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: expression increased by 75.5%, 69.9%, 160%, and 70% in EH151-inoculated plants at 1, 3, 10, and 14 h versus non-inoculated plants
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in leaves of EH151-inoculated soybean under stress
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. HKT1;1 transcript abundance was strongly elevated by EH151 under combined heat and salinity stress. 2. Its induction paralleled increased K+ content and higher K+/Na+ ratio in leaves. 3. The gene supports EH151-mediated ionic homeostasis.
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: enhances K+ uptake/retention and contributes to higher K+/Na+ ratio under stress
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: useful transporter target for engineering or selection for salt/heat resilience, potentially in combination with beneficial microbes
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Transporter gene; classified as Common Gene rather than pathway enzyme or TF.

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Na+ detoxification and ionic homeostasis under salinity stress
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: expression increased by 156%, 352%, 173%, and 124% in EH151-inoculated plants at 0, 1, 3, and 10 h versus non-inoculated plants
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in leaves of EH151-inoculated soybean under stress
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SOS1 was strongly upregulated by EH151 under combined stress. 2. Upregulation correlated with reduced Na+ accumulation and higher K+/Na+ ratio. 3. Results support enhanced Na+ efflux in EH151-treated soybean.
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: reduces Na+ accumulation and improves ionic homeostasis under stress
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: strong target for stress-resilient breeding or engineering aimed at Na+ exclusion

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: cellular pH regulation and Na+/K+ homeostasis under stress
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: showed expression trend similar to SOS1 and was higher in EH151-inoculated plants
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in inoculated leaves during combined stress
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. NHX2 expression followed a pattern similar to SOS1 under EH151 treatment. 2. Its induction was linked with improved Na+/K+ homeostasis during combined stress. 3. EH151 likely supports intracellular ion compartmentation through NHX2-associated processes.
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: supports Na+/K+ homeostasis and stress tolerance under EH151 inoculation
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: candidate target for improving intracellular Na+ sequestration/homeostasis in stress environments
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Direct fold changes were not fully specified in text, but increased expression was stated.

Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: EH151 increased ST1 expression by 120%, 135%, 17%, 37.9%, and 27.5% at 0, 1, 3, 10, and 14 h under stress
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in inoculated leaves under stress
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ST1 expression declined under stress overall but remained higher with EH151 treatment. 2. EH151-induced ST1 expression paralleled higher ABA accumulation. 3. The gene was associated with improved stress resistance and reduced ROS.
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: supports ABA-associated stress tolerance in EH151-treated soybean
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: possible marker for ABA-sensitive stress resilience under combined heat and salinity
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Paper refers to ST1 as salt tolerance 1 and discusses ABA sensitivity; precise molecular class not reported.

Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: expression decreased under combined stress; EH151 caused a slight increase at 1 h but generally reduced expression relative to non-inoculated stressed plants
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: lower in EH151-treated stressed leaves than non-inoculated stressed leaves at most time points
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. HSP90A2 expression decreased under combined heat and salinity stress. 2. EH151 slightly increased HSP90A2 early but generally reduced its expression relative to non-inoculated plants. 3. Lower HSP90A2 demand was interpreted as reduced stress damage in EH151-treated plants.
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: marker of reduced stress burden in EH151-inoculated soybean
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: stress biomarker rather than direct nutrient engineering target in this study
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Included because it was one of the main experimentally assayed genes in Results, though its link to nutrient metabolism is indirect.

Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: decreased continuously as stress persisted; non-inoculated plants had much higher expression than EH151-inoculated plants
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: lower in EH151-inoculated leaves during stress
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GSNOR expression declined during stress in both treatments. 2. Non-inoculated plants maintained substantially higher GSNOR expression than EH151-inoculated plants. 3. This pattern was interpreted together with NR expression to infer altered NO/redox status in stressed plants.
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: associated with altered NO/SNO homeostasis under EH151-mediated stress mitigation
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: redox-management target for abiotic stress resilience, though not specifically nutrient-accumulation engineering
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Metabolic relevance is indirect via redox signaling.

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: NO generation linked to stress responses
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: non-inoculated plants exhibited higher NR expression by 263%, 59%, and 92.8% at 3, 10, and 14 h relative to EH151-inoculated plants
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: lower in EH151-inoculated leaves during later stress
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. NR expression was significantly higher in non-inoculated plants during later combined stress. 2. Together with GSNOR patterns, this suggested higher NO production in more severely stressed plants. 3. EH151 treatment reduced the need for this stress-associated NO response.
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: associated with reduced stress-induced NO-related metabolism in EH151-treated plants
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: marker of stress intensity and N/NO metabolic state rather than direct target established here
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although nitrate reductase is an enzyme, here it was used mainly as a stress-response marker rather than a focal nutrient-pathway gene.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: central amino acid metabolism; stress acclimation under combined heat and salinity
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: upregulated in EH151-inoculated soybean during combined stress until 10 h
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: upregulated in EH151-inoculated leaves during combined stress until 10 h
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR gene expression profiling; metabolite profiling by GC-MS/amino acid analyzer
Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: central carbon metabolism; glutamate metabolism; amino acid metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: catalyzes glutamate formation in amino acid metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GS expression was higher in EH151-inoculated soybean than in non-inoculated plants under combined heat and salinity stress until 10 h. 2. Increased GS expression paralleled higher glutamate accumulation in EH151-treated plants at 14 h stress. 3. The data support a shift toward free amino acid metabolism in inoculated plants.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: promotes glutamate accumulation and amino-acid-centered stress acclimation
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: metabolomics by GC-MS and amino acid analyzer; no public accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: candidate target to enhance glutamate-centered stress metabolism when combined with beneficial microbial inoculation
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Gene was assayed as part of pathway expression profiling rather than direct genetic manipulation in this paper.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: metabolic hub for amino acid biosynthesis and stress defense
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: higher in EH151-inoculated soybean throughout combined stress period
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in EH151-inoculated leaves throughout combined stress period
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR gene expression profiling; metabolite profiling by GC-MS/amino acid analyzer
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: catalyzes aminotransfer between oxaloacetate/glutamate and aspartate/2-oxoglutarate in aspartate metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AST expression remained higher in EH151-inoculated soybean than in non-inoculated plants during the full stress period. 2. Elevated AST expression was consistent with increased aspartate accumulation in EH151-treated leaves. 3. The result supports enhanced amino acid synthesis rather than respiration in inoculated plants.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: promotes aspartate accumulation and supports amino acid metabolic reprogramming under stress
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: metabolomics by GC-MS and amino acid analyzer; no public accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: useful target to improve stress-associated amino acid biosynthesis in soybean
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Gene was used as pathway-supporting evidence; no direct mutant or transgenic validation.

Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: decreased with stress duration under EH151 inoculation; opposite trend in non-inoculated plants
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: decreased with stress duration in inoculated leaves
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR gene expression profiling; metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. PFK expression decreased over time in EH151-inoculated soybean under combined stress. 2. Non-inoculated plants showed the opposite trend, consistent with stronger glycolytic activation. 3. EH151 appears to reduce reliance on glycolytic respiration under stress.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: associated with reduced glycolytic activation in EH151-protected plants
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: metabolomics by GC-MS and amino acid analyzer; no public accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: marker for respiratory reprogramming under stress rather than a direct engineering target established here
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Included because it was experimentally profiled in Results as a central metabolic enzyme linked to metabolite shifts.

Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: decreased with stress duration under EH151 inoculation; opposite trend in non-inoculated plants
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: decreased with stress duration in inoculated leaves
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR gene expression profiling; metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. FBA expression fell with stress duration in EH151-inoculated plants. 2. Non-inoculated plants displayed an opposite expression trend. 3. This supports weaker glycolytic/respiratory activation in EH151-treated soybean under combined stress.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: associated with reduced glycolysis in EH151-inoculated plants
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: metabolomics by GC-MS and amino acid analyzer; no public accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: useful biomarker of carbon flux reprogramming under abiotic stress

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: controls respiratory carbon entry into TCA cycle during stress
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: downregulated under EH151 inoculation during combined stress; opposite trend in non-inoculated plants
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: downregulated in inoculated leaves during stress
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR gene expression profiling; metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: respiratory chain; TCA cycle entry; central carbon metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: inhibitory kinase that deactivates pyruvate dehydrogenase, reducing conversion of pyruvate to acetyl-CoA
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. PDK transcript levels were downregulated under EH151 inoculation during combined stress. 2. Non-inoculated plants showed the opposite trend. 3. The expression pattern was interpreted as part of altered respiratory regulation under microbial protection.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: associated with altered TCA-cycle entry and reduced respiratory stress response in EH151-treated plants
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: metabolomics by GC-MS and amino acid analyzer; no public accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: potential lever for respiratory acclimation, though direct engineering evidence is not established here
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Paper wording describes PDK as deactivating the PDK enzyme to prevent pyruvate conversion, which likely intends control of pyruvate dehydrogenase; interpretation kept cautious.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: ionic homeostasis and stress tolerance under salinity/heat
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: combined heat (42°C) and salinity (150 mM NaCl) stress with or without Bacillus velezensis EH151 inoculation
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: EH151 inoculation; combined heat and salinity stress
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: associated with enhanced ion regulator expression and improved K+/Na+ balance
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: higher in EH151-inoculated soybean than non-inoculated stressed plants at 1, 3, 10, and 14 h
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in inoculated leaves during combined stress
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; ion content analysis by ICP-MS
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MYB76 transcript abundance increased in EH151-inoculated plants relative to non-inoculated plants under combined stress. 2. Its induction paralleled higher K+, lower Na+, and higher K+/Na+ ratio. 3. The gene is implicated in ion-homeostatic stress protection promoted by EH151.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: condition-dependent controller of ionic homeostasis under combined stress
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: promotes improved K+/Na+ balance in EH151-inoculated soybean under stress
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: potential marker/regulatory target for breeding soybean with improved ionic stress resilience in microbe-assisted systems
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Direct target genes were not mechanistically tested in this paper; regulatory link is inferred from coordinated expression patterns.
